display_name: Database of Genomic Variants (DGV) gold standard
ingest_command: awk -F'\t' 'NR>1 {print $2"\t"$3"\t"$4"\t"$6"\tNA"}' GRCh38_hg38_variants_2020-02-25.txt | llmap variant-ingest --source dgv --kind sv --no-af --bucket-bp 100 --output dgv.priors
notes: Presence-only catalog (no allele frequencies). Useful for confirming a candidate SV is known, contributes to n_sv_overlapping but leaves sv_max_af=0.
